body.title: main.py: author==claude-code blocks background routing so CC messages are always foreground
body.result: Added 'or author == "claude-code"' to _intent_blocks_bg in main.py _process(). D313 comment explains rationale. CC design messages now always stay foreground — no more silent background-drop on action_request intent.
body.description: In main.py _process(), _intent_blocks_bg currently only checks parsed.intent against _INTERACTIVE_INTENTS. CC design messages (author=claude-code) get classified as action_request and routed to background, silently dropping replies. Fix: add 'or author == "claude-code"' to _intent_blocks_bg so all CC messages stay foreground. MEDIUM inertia — main.py.
